shadows.name: at-rest
shadows.purpose: Cards, panels, lifted surfaces at rest.

shadows.name: hover
shadows.purpose: Hover state for linkable cards. No movement, only shadow shift.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Modal dialogs, search panel, mobile menu drawer.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and entrances.

motion.name: duration-quick
motion.purpose: Hover state changes (shadow shift, colour shift).

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Drawer slides, modal enters, focus ring.

motion.name: reduced-motion-guard
motion.purpose: Required for WCAG 2.2 AA and PRODUCT.md accessibility commitment.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Citoyen action. Used for the single primary call on a screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: oklch(64% 0.17 47); color: oklch(98% 0.005 70); padding: 12px 20px; min-height: 44px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; font: 600 1rem/1.2 Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(58% 0.16 47); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(58% 0.16 47); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Quiet alternative to the primary. Bordered.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: oklch(98% 0.005 70); color: oklch(25% 0.01 70); padding: 11px 19px; min-height: 44px; border: 1px solid oklch(88% 0.01 70); border-radius: 6px; font: 600 1rem/1.2 Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(96% 0.008 70); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(58% 0.16 47); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: The homepage search field and any plain text input.
components.css: .ds-input-label { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-input-text { font: 500 0.8125rem/1.4 Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: oklch(45% 0.01 70); } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: oklch(94% 0.008 70); color: oklch(25% 0.01 70); padding: 10px 14px; min-height: 44px; border: 1px solid oklch(88% 0.01 70); border-radius: 6px; font: 400 1rem/1.5 Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(58% 0.008 70); } .ds-input:focus { outline: 2px solid oklch(58% 0.16 47); outline-offset: 2px; border-color: oklch(58% 0.16 47); }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Category filter on the article archive. At-rest and active states.
components.html: TousVivre à Marche
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 6px 14px; min-height: 32px; background: oklch(96% 0.008 70); color: oklch(45% 0.01 70); border: 1px solid oklch(88% 0.01 70); border-radius: 9999px; font: 500 0.8125rem/1.4 Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-chip:hover { background: oklch(88% 0.01 70); } .ds-chip--active { background: oklch(25% 0.01 70); color: oklch(98% 0.005 70); border-color: oklch(25% 0.01 70); } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(58% 0.16 47); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: News card, event card, partner card, bottin excerpt. Sits at rest; deepens shadow on hover; never translates.
components.html:
14 mai

Conseil communal du 14 mai 2026

L'ordre du jour de la séance publique est disponible.
components.css: .ds-card { display: block; background: oklch(98% 0.005 70); color: oklch(25% 0.01 70); border: 1px solid oklch(88% 0.01 70); border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(25% 0.01 70 / 0.04), 0 2px 8px oklch(25% 0.01 70 / 0.06); text-decoration: none; transition: box-shadow 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-card:hover { border-color: transparent; box-shadow: 0 2px 4px oklch(25% 0.01 70 / 0.06), 0 6px 16px oklch(25% 0.01 70 / 0.10); } .ds-card:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(58% 0.16 47); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-card__body { padding: 20px; } .ds-card__kicker { margin: 0 0 8px; font: 500 0.8125rem/1.4 Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: oklch(58% 0.008 70); } .ds-card__title { margin: 0 0 8px; font: 600 1.125rem/1.3 Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(25% 0.01 70); } .ds-card__excerpt { margin: 0; font: 400 1rem/1.6 Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(45% 0.01 70); }

components.name: Event Date Block
components.description: Signature component. The day/month block on the left of an event card.
components.css: .ds-date { display: inline-flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 16px 20px; background: oklch(96% 0.008 70); border-right: 1px solid oklch(88% 0.01 70); min-width: 88px; } .ds-date__day { font: 700 2rem/1 Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(25% 0.01 70); } .ds-date__month { margin-top: 4px; font: 500 0.8125rem/1.4 Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: oklch(58% 0.008 70); }

components.name: Top Navigation Link
components.description: Desktop nav item; active route is marked by a 2px underline in Citoyen Ember.
components.html: Vivre à MarcheAgenda
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 24px; padding: 0 16px; background: oklch(98% 0.005 70); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(88% 0.01 70); } .ds-nav__link { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 64px; padding: 0 4px; font: 600 1rem/1 Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(25% 0.01 70); text-decoration: none; transition: color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-nav__link:hover { color: oklch(53% 0.05 215); } .ds-nav__link--active { color: oklch(25% 0.01 70); } .ds-nav__link--active::after { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 4px; right: 4px; bottom: 0; height: 2px; background: oklch(64% 0.17 47); } .ds-nav__link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(58% 0.16 47); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Alert Strip
components.description: Time-sensitive civic notice on the homepage. Rare; the only warm surface in the system.
components.html:
Collecte des déchets reportée

La collecte du jeudi 14 mai est reportée au samedi 16 mai.

Lire la suite
components.css: .ds-alert { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 16px; padding: 16px 20px; background: oklch(96% 0.04 85); color: oklch(35% 0.10 60); } .ds-alert__icon { flex-shrink: 0; color: oklch(35% 0.10 60); } .ds-alert__body { flex: 1; } .ds-alert__title { margin: 0; font: 600 1.125rem/1.3 Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(35% 0.10 60); } .ds-alert__text { margin: 4px 0 0; font: 400 1rem/1.5 Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(35% 0.10 60); } .ds-alert__cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 8px 14px; min-height: 36px; background: oklch(35% 0.10 60); color: oklch(98% 0.005 70); border-radius: 6px; font: 600 0.875rem/1 Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-alert__cta:hover { background: oklch(28% 0.09 60); } .ds-alert__cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(58% 0.16 47); outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: The site is the printed civic almanac of Marche-en-Famenne, rebuilt for screens. An almanac is grounded in the calendar, in the place, in the year's rhythm — the council meeting on Tuesday, the rubbish collection on Thursday, the carnival in March, the agricultural fair in July. Its job is to be useful, complete, and unmistakably of here. It does not market the town. It records it. That metaphor governs everything: the page is paper, not glass. Type carries the weight; one warm orange carries the action. Photography is of the real Famenne, never stock. Depth is light, layered rather than lifted. Hover gives feedback, never animation. This system explicitly rejects two things: the generic AI municipal template (triple slate gradient, extrabold Bienvenue à hero, rounded-xl icon-circle tiles, hover lift cards), and the 1990s administrative portal (dense tables, dark navy, no images, joyless prose). The Almanac sits between them.
keyCharacteristics: Paper-tinted neutrals, not slate. Warmth lives in the substrate.
One accent. Citoyen Ember appears on action and on almost nothing else.
Type is the structure. Hierarchy comes from scale and weight, not from decorative borders or coloured stripes.
Cards sit. They do not lift, scale, or translate. Hover deepens the shadow by one step; nothing moves.
Real photography of Marche-en-Famenne. No stock, no agency cinematics.
WCAG 2.2 AA is the floor, not the target.

rules.name: The One Ember Rule
rules.body: Citoyen Ember appears on ≤10% of any rendered viewport. If two ember elements would touch or appear in the same eye-sweep, demote one to Ardennes Slate. The accent works because it is rare.

rules.name: The Paper Rule
rules.body: No #ffffff. No #000000. Every surface is tinted toward warmth (chroma 0.005–0.01 toward hue 47). The page is paper, not glass.

rules.name: The Tinted-Neutral Rule
rules.body: One neutral family. The current mix of gray-* and slate-* Tailwind classes is prohibited. New work uses the seven named neutrals and nothing else.

rules.name: The Single-Family Rule
rules.body: One face for the whole system. A second face enters only with a documented voice reason and a /impeccable typeset pass.

rules.name: The Real-Weight Rule
rules.body: Weight classes name actual weights. The current font-montserrat-thin / font-montserrat-bold aliases (all pointing at one weight) are prohibited.

rules.name: The Measure Rule
rules.body: Long-form body text caps at 75ch. Article bodies apply max-w-prose or equivalent; never full viewport width on prose.

rules.name: The Single-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Three shadow values exist. Components pick one of three: at-rest, hover, overlay. Never invent a fourth.

rules.name: The No-Translate Rule
rules.body: Hover never moves an element. No translate-y, no scale-105, no translate-x. Only shadow opacity and (occasionally) background colour change on hover.

dos: Do treat Citoyen Ember as a finite resource. If the page has a primary button and an active filter chip, that's already two embers. Demote one.
Do tint every neutral toward the orange hue (chroma 0.005–0.01 at hue 47). The substrate is what makes the system feel civic-warm instead of generic-slate.
Do carry hierarchy through scale and weight. Headings step ≥1.25× in size, ≥100 in weight, between levels.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: reduce. Every animation in tailwind.css needs an override that disables it.
Do use the three-step shadow vocabulary. At-rest, hover, overlay. Nothing else.
Do ship real photography of Marche-en-Famenne. The market square, the Famenne hills, the Carnaval, the agricultural fair. Alt text is part of the voice.
Do cap body line length at 75ch. Long-form articles get max-w-prose or an equivalent column.
donts: Don't ship the generic AI municipal template: no triple slate gradient, no centered extrabold Bienvenue à hero, no rounded-xl icon-circle shortcut tiles, no hover:-translate-y-1 shadow-lg cards.
Don't ship the 1990s administrative portal: no dense link tables, no dark-navy chrome, no joyless prose, no Cliquez ici.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-l-4 or any border-l-/border-r- greater than 1px) as a coloured accent. Replace with full borders, background tints, or nothing.
Don't use #ffffff or #000000. Every neutral is tinted.
Don't mix gray-* and slate-* Tailwind utilities. One neutral family.
Don't translate, lift, or scale on hover. No hover:-translate-y-1, no group-hover:scale-105.
Don't ladder shadows beyond the three named levels. shadow-md, shadow-xl, shadow-2xl utilities are out.
Don't use gradient text. Single solid colour for every word on the page.
Don't use all-caps body or label copy. Sentence case for everything except acronyms.
Don't use em dashes in copy. Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses.
Don't use the fake font-montserrat-* weight aliases. They all point at one weight.
Don't load Google Fonts via @import url(...) in CSS. Self-host Montserrat with font-display: swap.
Don't repeat headings or restate intros. One of each, always.
Don't use the per-blog identity colours as dominant surfaces.
